name: Ailomics Therapeutics
tagline: Chinese AI drug discovery with human-derived biology models
description: Shanghai-based Ailomics Therapeutics launched in 2022 combining AI with experimental biology and single-cell data analysis to accelerate drug discovery. Amid a 42% drop in global AI drug discovery funding between 2022-2023 and post-hype disillusionment, whistleblower reports indicate the company is quietly winding down in 2025.

sources.title: Chinese AI Biotech Sector Faces Downturn as Another Startup Struggles

rejection_reason: Insufficient corroboration of shutdown claim — only a single whistleblower-sourced report; company may still be operating.
